Man Tax: Billy Huxley “Three things in human life are important: the first is to be kind; the second is to be kind; and the third is to be kind.” ― Henry James Can I make a suggestion? Instead of picking out the one thing in this post that you don't like, and correcting it or complaining about it, comment about something you did like? Seems like half the comments are usually like that. Don't kill our vibe, man.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 199)
item.description:
Welcome to the 199th edition in this series, let's do some good today. Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 198) https://imgur.com/gallery/u7BNcTg Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 197) https://imgur.com/gallery/KgqlsIO Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 196) https://imgur.com/gallery/8cXisGQ Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 195) https://imgur.com/gallery/CCZXP4o Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 194) https://imgur.com/gallery/j8e1zRE Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 193) https://imgur.com/gallery/zUNZTnO Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 192) https://imgur.com/gallery/ef4CV1o Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 191) https://imgur.com/gallery/Cg6iteN Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 181-190) https://imgur.com/a/g3sTR0J Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 171-180) https://imgur.com/a/7OnodoA Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 161-170) https://imgur.com/a/3SfMNfg Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 151-160) https://imgur.com/a/a3npRvx Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 100-150) https://imgur.com/a/rdkioD9 Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (First 100 days) https://imgur.com/a/SGVY2vD
Progress looks different for everyone
"He said he appreciated the offer and he paid me what his Uber ride would've cost back to his home in Connecticut"
We miss you Nanna Pants
TheFreePizzaDude - tomorrow at 2pm central!
And it always makes me feel better to put up these posts. ... TheFreePizzaDude Friday at 2pm central If you can't make it but would like to help a struggling Imgurian get groceries or a meal https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude ... Thank you for being here for me while I elevate my foot https://imgur.com/a/ltb70zF
item.dc:creator: MrPuckett

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1367 (the consent of the herbivores)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
!!!!!!
This is a mood. This is a mood for me with Pippin.
As a complete aside, if you like cold adult treats, blend a gin and tonic with ice and turn it into a slushy. IT WILL CHANGE YOUR LIFE. Trust me.
Or be buried and fossilized.
This is an important clarification.
More issues with finding a job.
The first super-continent and the Oklo Natural reactor
The only archosaurs to have potentially figured out how to give live birth, maybe.
The dangers of being with someone who makes you laugh.
One of the earliest fossil biotas.
This guy on reddit is doing a meme geologic history of earth, expect more of them over the next few dumps.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: [Coughing noises, followed by laughter] ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride

item.title: What Happened Today #111
item.description: ??✈️ While House Republicans spent today negotiating baby bond names and appeasing budget holdouts, Trump's government violated court orders to deport migrants, fired independent oversight boards, and accepted a $400 million jet from Qatar that he'll personally keep in three years. Courts are working overtime to block constitutional violations while Congress plays political theater, but judges can't stop everything, and the damage compounds every day that we pretend this is normal governance instead of systematic destruction.  Meanwhile, don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this summary to you every night, free and private, so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email on the homepage of the website at GovBrief.today #govbrieftoday #resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-ramaphosa-oval 2. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-gift-jet 3. https://go.govbrief.today/israeli-embassy-staffers-shot 4. https://go.govbrief.today/congo-rwanda-trump 5. https://go.govbrief.today/budget-bill-advancing 6. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-baby-accounts 7. https://go.govbrief.today/eeoc-abortion-accomodations 8. https://go.govbrief.today/khalil-child-graduation 9. https://go.govbrief.today/senate-car-air-standards 10. https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-prayer-service 11. https://go.govbrief.today/army-pay-streets 12. https://go.govbrief.today/books-back-shelves 13. https://go.govbrief.today/sudan-flight-violation 14. https://go.govbrief.today/police-minneapolis-louisville 15. https://go.govbrief.today/fema-cancels-plan 16. https://go.govbrief.today/civil-liberties-oversight Yesterday's Top Story - https://go.govbrief.today/noem-habeas-corpus Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/springsteen-trump-ep
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Dump of amazing things
item.description:
A different kind of cans
2. Buttoning up your boots.
3. Slingshot fishing.
4. There is no rope in this image... It's just marble.
5. "Urban Theory" dance crew.
6. The real Giorgio.
7. Lukla airport in Nepal.
8. Homeless 18 wheeler......
9. Wheel Gymnastics, so smooth.
10. I tried to ride one of these and fell. This is just impressive.
11. Front row seat at a building destruction.
12. Would you ...? It's probably totally safe.
13. Insane setup for GTA.
14. Drawings.
15. Humans as objects.
16. A nice 3D game we all may know on screen ....
17. A walking tent.
18. Working from home in Oban, Scotland.
19. Ideas for a comfy hammock.
20. Yes it's an egg.
21. A car based grass cutter.
22. The paper shows the process. The bottle shows the magic.

item.title: Haven't missed anything important
item.description: My company constantly sends out phishing test emails, like 2-3 a day, and then makes anyone who falls for them do an online seminar about phishing. Recently, we started a massive new sponsorship deal with a pro sports team. The day after the big announcement, there was a fake email offering employees discount tickets. It looked exactly like the ones we get about real tickets. Like 3/4 of the company fell for it so we ALL had to do remedial training. Since then I have just mass deleted all my emails every morning. Anything related to a give away I report to security. When security tells me the email was safe, I report that also. Honestly curious how long it will take for me to miss something important
item.dc:creator: OO00OO00
